text:
I see - native tokens use `0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000`. The problem is that when you select ETH on Ethereum and ETH on Base, both have the same address (`0x0000...`), so Relay thinks they're the same currency. 

The solution is that Relay needs the **currency to include the chain ID** to differentiate them. Let me check the Relay API - we might need to use a different format like `chainId:address`:
